title: cyperus alatus
intro: Cyperus alatus, also known as the winged flatsedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cyperus alatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
